name: Yi Sun-shin
intro: Yi Sun-shin, the Paenlong Legend, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Heavenly Vow
abilities.description: Buff Yi Sun-shin attacks with his longbow and glaive according to his distance from the target. Weapon Mastery : After each weapon switch, the next two Basic Attacks will gain extra Attack Speed , dealing 70% and 55% Crit Damage respectively, and gain 15% Movement Speed for 1 second.

abilities.name: Traceless
abilities.description: Mobility AOE Yi Sun-shin dashes forward and slashes with his glaive, dealing 150–300 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and becoming immune to control effects for 1 second. Each Weapon Mastery triggered reduces the cooldown of Traceless by 1 second. Skill terms Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Control Immunity You are immune to enemy CC effects (Suppressed excluded) within the duration.

abilities.name: Blood Floods
abilities.description: AOE Tap : Yi Sun-shin slashes swiftly with his glaive, dealing 240–340 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . Hold : Yi Sun-shin shoots a powerful arrow, dealing 240–340 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the target. The arrow's damage scales with the hold time, up to 200%. Yi Sun-shin gains Weapon Mastery immediately when this skill is used.

abilities.name: Mountain Shocker
abilities.description: Burst CC Yi Sun-shin summons a turtle ship and gains sight of the whole map for 5 seconds. The turtle ship lasts for up to 15 seconds, during which Yi Sun-shin gains 70% burst Movement Speed (decay to 20% over 2 seconds). When cast again, Yi Sun-shin commands the turtle ship to ram towards the target area, dealing 160–320 (+65% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and stunning enemy units in the central area for 0.8 seconds. Then Yi Sun-shin commands the naval fleet to launch 3 waves of cannon shots on a larger area, each dealing 160–320 (+65% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and slowing the enemies by 30%. Yi Sun-shin gains Weapon Mastery effect immediately when this skill is used. Skill terms Stun Basic level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt some skills.
